MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-12-2008 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff in Propria Persona for failure to file Proof of Service, obtain answer or enter Default against Defendant John Harris is heard this day. There being no appearance nor an objection filed the court ordered the balance of this case dismissed pursuant to CCP Sections 583.210 and 583.250. The court having reviewed the file finds no good cause or substantial justification for plaintiff's failure to comply with the court's orders and rules. The court finds that a less severe sanction would not be effective due to the history of lack of compliance. Proceedings reported by: Trina Ayala, CSR#12964. (212)

Off Calendar Mar-02-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Enterprises Rent-A-Car Company's motion for terminating sanctions for non-compliance with the prior court order is denied without prejudice. The October 19, 2006 ruling has never been incorporated into an order and was never been served on plaintiff. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel Answers To Interrogatories And Production Requests And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
Off Calendar Oct-19-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Defendant Enterprise Rent-A-Car Company of San Francisco's motion to compel responses to form interrogatories and request for production of documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff is ordered to serve complete verified responses without objections within 21 days of notice of this order. Failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Monetary sanctions in the amount of $372.30 are to be paid within 21 days of notice of this order. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN
